meta.title: 299note — For pets, vets, and the families who love them.
meta.description: A pet healthcare platform connecting owners and veterinary clinics through health data and shared stories.

hero.headline:
Nurturing pet health,
together with family and vets.
hero.subheadline:
A pet healthcare platform connecting owners and
veterinary clinics through health data and shared stories.

why.title: Why 299note was born
why.para1: It started with grief. When my family lost our pet, I watched everyone around me fall apart with sadness. I wanted to do something — to preserve the memories, to offer comfort, and to make sure no one had to feel so helpless in that moment.
why.para2: I asked myself what I could build with technology. The answer became 299note: a memorial and wellness SNS where owners can cherish every moment of their pet's life and share it with family and friends — and a health record platform that helps veterinary clinics deliver better, more informed care.
why.para3: Development is 90% complete. We are now preparing for beta testing.

health.title: Health records
health.body: Weight trends, vaccination schedules, medication reminders. Your pet's complete health history, always at hand.

sns.title: Pet owner community
sns.body: Share everyday moments, follow other pet families, and connect through likes and comments.

clinic.title: Clinic integration
clinic.body: Receive test results and medical records directly from your vet. Owner and clinic, connected.

memorial.title: Rainbow Bridge memorial
memorial.body: Keep the precious memories of pets who have crossed the rainbow bridge. Photos and records preserved forever.

global.title: 5 languages supported
global.body: Korean, English, 日本語, Español, Deutsch. A global platform for pet families everywhere.

b2b.title: Veterinary clinics — join our beta
b2b.intro: We are looking for forward-thinking clinics to partner with during our beta phase. Here is what you get:

merits.title: Medical record backup
merits.body: An owner-side layer that mirrors clinical records — reducing the risk of data loss and giving owners easy access to their pet's history.

merits.title: Richer patient context
merits.body: Daily habit logs — appetite, water intake, sleep, behavior — give you a fuller picture before the animal even walks in.

merits.title: Fewer repeated questions
merits.body: Food and water intake are charted automatically. Diagnose from data, not from memory.

merits.title: Digitise paper charts
merits.body: Upload photos of handwritten medical records. OCR + AI data extraction is planned for a future release.

merits.title: Simplify your infrastructure
merits.body: A lean patient-facing layer on top of whatever EMR you already use. No replacement, no disruption — pure DX.

contact.title: Contact
contact.body: For partnerships, clinic adoption, press inquiries or anything else, please feel free to reach out.

about.body: 299note is an independent project in development within the pet healthcare space. Based in Yokohama, Japan, we aim to improve quality of life for pets and their families.
